en.name: Sabo
en.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may add 1 of your Characters with a cost of 3 or more and 7000 power or more to the top of your Life cards face-up: Up to 1 of your Characters gains +2000 power until the start of your next turn.

jp.name: サボ
jp.effectText: 【ドン!!×1】【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分のコスト3以上でパワー7000以上のキャラ1枚を自分のライフの上に表向きで加えることができる：自分のキャラ1枚までは、次の自分のターン開始時まで、パワー+2000。

definition.name: Sabo
definition.text: [DON!! x1] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may add 1 of your Characters with a cost of 3 or more and 7000 power or more to the top of your Life cards face-up: Up to 1 of your Characters gains +2000 power until the start of your next turn.

en.name: Portgas.D.Ace
en.effectText: [DON!! x2] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck and add up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 to the top of your Life cards face-up. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.[End of Your Turn] Trash all your face-up Life cards.

jp.name: ポートガス・D・エース
jp.effectText: 【ドン!!×2】【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分のデッキの上から5枚を見て、コスト5のキャラカード1枚までを、ライフの上に表向きで加える。その後、残りを好きな順番でデッキの下に置く。【自分のターン終了時】自分のライフの表向きのカードすべてをトラッシュに置く。

definition.name: Portgas.D.Ace
definition.text: [DON!! x2] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck and add up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 to the top of your Life cards face-up. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.[End of Your Turn] Trash all your face-up Life cards.

en.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
en.effectText: Your face-up Life cards are placed at the bottom of your deck instead of being added to your hand, according to the rules.[DON!! x2] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: If you have 0 Life cards, add up to 2 Character cards with a cost of 5 from your hand or trash to the top of your Life cards face-up.

jp.name: モンキー・D・ルフィ
jp.effectText: ルール上、自分の表向きのライフは手札に加わる代わりにデッキの下に置かれる。【ドン!!×2】【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分の手札1枚を捨てることができる：自分のライフが0枚の場合、自分の手札かトラッシュのコスト5のキャラカード2枚までを、自分のライフの上に表向きで加える。

definition.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
definition.text: Your face-up Life cards are placed at the bottom of your deck instead of being added to your hand, according to the rules.[DON!! x2] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: If you have 0 Life cards, add up to 2 Character cards with a cost of 5 from your hand or trash to the top of your Life cards face-up.

en.name: Edward.Newgate
en.effectText: [On Play] Add 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards. Then, look at all your Life cards; place 1 card at the top of your deck and place the rest back in your Life area in any order.

jp.name: エドワード・ニューゲート
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のデッキの上から1枚をライフの上に加える。その後、自分のライフすべてを見て、1枚を自分のデッキの上に置き、ライフを好きな順番で置く。

definition.name: Edward.Newgate
definition.text: [On Play] Add 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards. Then, look at all your Life cards; place 1 card at the top of your deck and place the rest back in your Life area in any order.

en.name: Emporio.Ivankov
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] You may trash 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards: Reveal up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 from your hand and add it to the top of your Life cards face-down.

jp.name: エンポリオ・イワンコフ
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)【登場時】自分のライフの上か下から1枚をトラッシュに置くことができる：自分の手札のコスト5のキャラカード1枚までを公開し、ライフの上に裏向きで加える。

definition.name: Emporio.Ivankov
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] You may trash 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards: Reveal up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 from your hand and add it to the top of your Life cards face-down.

jp.name: カーリー・ダダン

en.name: Sabo

definition.name: Shanks

[Trigger] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Add up to 1 card from your hand to the top of your Life cards.

en.name: The Three Brothers' Bond
en.effectText: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Sabo], [Portgas.D.Ace], or [Monkey.D.Luffy] with a cost of 5 or less and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.

jp.name: 3兄弟の絆
jp.effectText: 【メイン】自分のデッキの上から5枚を見て、コスト5以下の、「サボ」か「ポートガス・D・エース」か「モンキー・D・ルフィ」1枚までを公開し、手札に加える。その後、残りを好きな順番でデッキの下に置く。 【トリガー】このカードの【メイン】効果を発動する。

definition.name: The Three Brothers' Bond
definition.text: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Sabo], [Portgas.D.Ace], or [Monkey.D.Luffy] with a cost of 5 or less and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.
